Main application entry point for the Virtual Calendar.

Test suite for CalendarApp main application entry point.

Interface for calendar application controllers.

Handles calendar-related property change events.

Creates a new calendar controller handler.
CalendarControllerTests - Class in <Unnamed>
Test suite for calendar controller GUI components.

CalendarDayPanel - Class in calendar.view.gui.panels
Panel for displaying a single day view of the calendar.
CalendarDayPanel() - Constructor for class calendar.view.gui.panels.CalendarDayPanel
Creates a new calendar day panel.
CalendarDialog - Class in calendar.view.gui.dialogs
Dialog for creating and editing calendars.
CalendarDialog(Window, String, ZoneId) - Constructor for class calendar.view.gui.dialogs.CalendarDialog
Creates a dialog for calendar management.
CalendarEvent - Class in calendar.model
Immutable representation of a calendar event with support for both single and recurring occurrences.
CalendarEvent.Builder - Class in calendar.model
Builder class for constructing CalendarEvent instances.
CalendarEventData - Class in calendar.controller.gui.eventdata
Typed data class for calendar-related property change events.
CalendarEventData() - Constructor for class calendar.controller.gui.eventdata.CalendarEventData
 
CalendarEventData.CreateCalendar - Class in calendar.controller.gui.eventdata
Data for create calendar event.
CalendarEventData.EditCalendar - Class in calendar.controller.gui.eventdata
Data for edit calendar event.
CalendarEventData.ExportCalendar - Class in calendar.controller.gui.eventdata
Data for export calendar event.
CalendarEventData.ImportCalendar - Class in calendar.controller.gui.eventdata
Data for import calendar event.
CalendarListPanel - Class in calendar.view.gui.panels
Panel for displaying and managing multiple calendars.
CalendarListPanel() - Constructor for class calendar.view.gui.panels.CalendarListPanel
Creates a new calendar list panel.
CalendarModel - Interface in calendar.model
Interface defining the contract for calendar data models.

Panel for displaying a month view of the calendar.

Creates a new calendar month panel.

Thrown when a requested calendar does not exist.

Checks if this handler can handle the given property type.
canHandle(PropertyType) - Method in class calendar.controller.gui.ViewControllerHandler
 
Command - Interface in calendar.controller.command
Functional command interface bridging parsed commands to concrete handlers.
CommandContext - Class in calendar.controller.command
Carries optional execution context extracted from the command string, such as an explicit calendar target (ON <calendar>) or timezone override (AT TZ <zoneId>).
CommandHandler - Class in calendar.controller
Executes parsed commands by coordinating between model and view.
CommandHandler(CalendarModel, CalendarView) - Constructor for class calendar.controller.CommandHandler
Creates a command handler.
CommandParser - Class in calendar.controller.parser
Parses command strings into structured command data.
CommandParser() - Constructor for class calendar.controller.parser.CommandParser
 
CommandRegistry - Class in calendar.controller.command
Central registry that maps CommandType to executable Commands.
CommandRegistry(CommandHandler) - Constructor for class calendar.controller.command.CommandRegistry
Builds the registry and wires command types to handler methods.
CommandTest - Class in <Unnamed>
Comprehensive test suite for the command package classes.
CommandTest() - Constructor for class CommandTest
 
CommandType - Enum in calendar.controller.parser
Enum representing command types.

Console-based implementation of CalendarView.

Creates a ConsoleView using System.out and System.err.

Creates a ConsoleView with custom streams (useful for testing).

copyEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, LocalDateTime) - Method in interface calendar.model.CalendarModel
Copies a single event (or its entire series) to another calendar at a target start time.
copyEvent(String, LocalDateTime, String, LocalDateTime) - Method in class calendar.model.SparseHashCalendar
 
CopyEventParams - Class in calendar.controller.parser
Parameters for the copy event command.
CopyEventParams(String, LocalDateTime, String, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class calendar.controller.parser.CopyEventParams
Creates parameters for copy event command.
copyEventsBetween(LocalDate, LocalDate, String, LocalDate) - Method in interface calendar.model.CalendarModel
Copies all events overlapping the provided interval (inclusive) to another calendar.
copyEventsBetween(LocalDate, LocalDate, String, LocalDate) - Method in class calendar.model.SparseHashCalendar
 
CopyEventsBetweenParams - Class in calendar.controller.parser
Parameters for copy events between command.

Creates parameter bundle for copy events between command.

copyEventsOnDate(LocalDate, String, LocalDate) - Method in interface calendar.model.CalendarModel
Copies all events on a specific date to another calendar.
copyEventsOnDate(LocalDate, String, LocalDate) - Method in class calendar.model.SparseHashCalendar

Parameters for copy events on command.
